title: 招牌栏目 Signature Series Development
description: Develop recurring series that viewers return for — the key to habit-forming audiences

tasks.text: Design "这步你会走吗？" (Would You Play This?) format — interactive puzzle
Design "引擎 vs 大师" (Engine vs Grandmaster) format — compare engine lines to human choices
Design "名局故事" (Famous Game Stories) format — cultural storytelling + analysis
Create intro/outro templates for each series
Record pilot episode for each series
A/B test which series gets best retention
Double down on winning series — commit to weekly cadence
